name: Frozen Chocolate Cheesecake Torte
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a small bowl, combine crumbs and butter; mix well.
3. Press firmly into bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
4. Bake for 10 minutes.
5. In a medium bowl, combine cream cheese, sugar, vanilla, and salt.
6. Beat with electric mixer on medium speed until smooth.
7. Add chocolate and beat an additional 2 minutes.
8. Fold in whipped cream. Stir in pecans.
9. Turn into baked crust, spreading evenly.
10. Freeze for eight hours or longer until firm.
11. Cover tightly and store in freezer.
12. Remove from freezer 1/2 hour before serving for ease in cutting.
